by Rs26.77 per litre, taking the new rate to Rs393.35 per litre.\n\nThe revised prices of petroleum products will come into effect from 25 April (Saturday). According to details issued on Friday, the price of high-speed diesel has also been raised by Rs26.77 per litre.\n\nThe new price of high-speed diesel has been set at Rs380.19 per litre.\n\nThe
